segments.text: For the director of music. To the tune of "Lilies." Of the Sons of Korah. A maskil. A wedding song.
My heart is stirred by a noble theme as I recite my verses for the king;
My tongue is the pen of a skillful writer.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: is inditing: Heb. boileth, or, bubbleth up
heading: A Royal Wedding Song

segments.text: You are the most excellent of men
and your lips have been anointed with grace, since God has blessed you forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Gird your sword on your side, you mighty one; clothe yourself with splendor and majesty.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: In your majesty ride forth victoriously in behalf of truth, humility and righteousness; let your right hand achieve awesome deeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: ride…: Heb. prosper thou, ride thou

segments.text: Let your sharp arrows pierce the hearts of the king's enemies; let the nations fall beneath your feet.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Your throne, O God, will last for ever and ever; a scepter of justice will be the scepter of your kingdom.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have loved righteousness and hated wickedness;
therefore God, your God, has set you above your companions by anointing you with the oil of joy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All your robes are fragrant with myrrh and aloes and cassia;
from palaces adorned with ivory the music of the strings makes you glad.
Daughters of kings are among your honored women; at your right hand is the royal bride in gold of Ophir.
Listen, daughter, and pay careful attention: Forget your people and your father's household.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the king be enthralled by your beauty; honor him, for he is your lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The city of Tyre will come with a gift, people of wealth will seek your favor.
All glorious is the princess within her chamber; her gown is interwoven with gold.
In embroidered garments she is led to the king; her virgin companions follow her— those brought to be with her.
They are led in with joy and gladness; they enter the palace of the king.
Your sons will take the place of your fathers; you will make them princes throughout the land.
I will perpetuate your memory through all generations; therefore the nations will praise you for ever and ever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
